scripts.db:backup: docker exec postgres pg_dump -U claw -Fc personalclaw > backup_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).dump
scripts.db:restore: docker exec -i postgres pg_restore -U claw --clean --if-exists -d personalclaw <
scripts.db:reset: bun run db:backup && psql $DATABASE_URL -c 'DROP SCHEMA IF EXISTS drizzle CASCADE; DROP SCHEMA public CASCADE; CREATE SCHEMA public;' && bun run db:migrate && bun run db:seed
